sidebar.newFolderDesc: Create a folder to organize topics.
sidebar.notEnoughMessages: Not enough messages to auto rename
sidebar.topicPromptDesc: Set an extra prompt for this topic. It will be injected into this topic's chat.
sidebar.confirmClearMessagesDesc: This removes all messages in the topic and resets its title while keeping the topic and its settings.
sidebar.confirmBatchDeleteDesc: This removes those topics' messages and reclaims attachments referenced only by them.
sidebar.confirmBatchDeleteKeepingLastDesc: The current selection includes the last topic that must remain. Continuing will delete the other topics, clear the kept topic's messages, and reset its title.
sidebar.confirmDeleteDesc: Deleting this topic removes its messages and reclaims attachments only referenced by this topic. This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.confirmDeleteLastTopicDesc: This is the last remaining topic. Continuing will keep the topic itself but clear all messages inside it and reset its title.
